name: Delete User Account (Soft Delete) Performance Test
description: Validate the performance and reliability of the user account soft delete operation when multiple users are deactivated concurrently.
preconditions: Test users must exist and be in active status.
Authorization credentials must be included in the request headers.
Users selected for testing must not have pending transactions that prevent deletion.

input data.type of load: Concurrent write operation simulating 50 simultaneous deactivations

metrics.target value: Deactivated users must not appear in /users/active

notes: Verify after execution that deactivated users are excluded from the active users endpoint and ensure test users are reset between test runs.
